context_summary: Implement a scoped data/test/docs refactor for Game content extraction blind-box pilots. Replace five-layer pilot pools with four default-safe pools and keep BLIND_BOXES four-column compatibility.
existing_patterns: BLIND_BOX_PILOT_BOX_IDS maps 桌面+学习, 海底+潜水, 公园+野餐 to 15, 16, 17.
BLIND_BOX_ITEM_POOL_BUNDLES currently stores five-layer pilot pools.
test_blind_box_content_model.py imports data constants and verifies schema, compatibility, and forbidden patterns.
target_patterns: Pilot bundles use exactly four content pools.
blocked_or_risky is removed from candidate bundles.
BLIND_BOXES remains compatible with existing UI and input parsing.
risk_factors: Existing working tree contains prior generated spec/docs changes.
Multiple tasks touch the same data file, so execution should be sequential.
hanging compatibility field needs careful handling to avoid reintroducing low-quality objects.
implementation_constraints: Do not change APP_VERSION or release packaging.
Do not introduce image recognition, anchor detection, or user text trigger parsing.
